item.title: DMR Slows Post-Tirzepatide Weight Regain
item.description: Early results from a pilot study show the minimally invasive endoscopic intervention reduces the weight gain that occurs following discontinuation of ...

item.title: UK Biobank Members' Health Data Found for Sale on Alibaba
item.description: The UK government confirmed the breach after Biobank data on all 500,000 members appeared listed for sale, though names and addresses were not include...

item.title: Lonapegsomatropin Shows Long-Term Benefit in Adult GHD
item.description: A 52-week extension study showed that the drug continues to maintain favorable body composition with no safety issues. Medscape Medical News

item.title: One-Month Limit Imposed on Ramipril 1.25-mg Supplies
item.description: New shortage protocol allows UK pharmacists to restrict dispensing as supply pressures hit a drug used by millions. Medscape News UK

item.title: Challenges of Placebo Arms in Weight-Loss Drug Trials
item.description: Drugmakers continue to test weight-loss medicines against dummy pills and shots, even with a growing number of effective approved obesity drugs. This ...
